Malnutrition Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had an active diagnosis of malnutrition (protein or calorie) or at risk for malnutrition in the last seven days. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
313 I5700_ANXTY_DSORDR_CD I5700_ANXTY_DSORDR_CD I5700 Active Diagnoses: Anxiety Disorder Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates if the resident had an active diagnosis of an anxiety disorder in the last seven days. -=Not assessed/no
